topic: How many people judge a business's credibility by its website
caption:
75% of your customers decided to trust you before they ever called.
Your website is doing the talking whether you like it or not.
In the High Desert, that first impression matters.
We build sites that actually work for small businesses like yours.

copy.headline: of people judge credibility by your website
copy.body: 75% of consumers admit to judging a business's credibility based on its website design. (Source: Stanford Web Credibility Research)
